footer.thesis: by hseshadr is open source — and runs on your device. Search, ranking, and recommendations execute right in this browser tab, with no per-query backend.
footer.demoBefore: Nimbus is a fictional demo store built to showcase
footer.demoAfter: — its entire search-and-recommend brain runs in this browser tab.
